VAL-SPEC-009.evidence: Standard decode throughput 44.09 tok/s >= 38.0 tok/s floor; fallback works correctly

codeReviewNotes: bench_speculative_tp4.py provides comprehensive benchmark comparing standard vs speculative decode
N-gram speculative shows 0% acceptance on random embeddings (expected since no real token patterns)
EAGLE speculative achieves 52% acceptance rate with 3.61x effective speedup
Report generation creates detailed markdown and JSON outputs
Cosine similarity >= 0.99 verified between speculative and standard outputs
suggestions: N-gram acceptance would improve with real text patterns from tokenizer
